docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM JOHNSON IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOANNA CHENG. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, JOANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED NOV-11-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, JOANNA
